metaDescription: DeepSeek-Coder-V2 (DeepSeek), released 2024-06-17 — part of the DeepSeek Coder line. Open MoE code model (16B and 236B sizes, 2.4B/21B active) further pre-trai…
overview: DeepSeek-Coder-V2 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek Coder line. Released 2024-06-17. Code-specialised open-weight line; the original dense models plus the V2 MoE that reached GPT-4-Turbo-level code performance across 338 languages.
What's notable in this version: Open MoE code model (16B and 236B sizes, 2.4B/21B active) further pre-trained from V2; 338 languages and 128K context, GPT-4-Turbo-class on code.
